cards.title: Tutor Support Training
cards.bodyHtml:
Core training module for tutor-side support workflows. Review during your first week and revisit periodically as processes update.

Google Slides · Tutor Ops

Open the Tutor Support Training deck →

cards.title: Platform Support Training
cards.bodyHtml:
Core training module for platform-side support workflows. Review during your first week and revisit periodically as processes update.

Google Slides · Platform Ops

Open the Platform Support Training deck →

cards.title: How to Use
cards.bodyHtml:
Navigation

  • Click either training link above to open the deck in a new tab.
  • Once open, use the arrow keys (or the Slides controls) to navigate.
  • Press F11 or use the Slides menu to enter fullscreen presentation mode.

cards.title: Training Notes
cards.bodyHtml:
Reminders

  • Review both decks during your first week.
  • Revisit periodically as processes update.
  • Reach out to your Team Lead with any questions.
